title: L2 / AA footguns (zkSync: extcodesize EOA-check, isContract sig branch)
note: extcodesize as EOA/contract check -> zkSync & native-AA: EOAs can have code and a counterfactual smart-account has none; auth/signature gates on 'isContract' are bypassable
